p2p_enrichment.notes:
Added 5 new pass_to_pass tests derived from repo CI/CD:
1. test_all_python_syntax - validates all Python files parse correctly
2. test_pyproject_toml_valid - validates pyproject.toml is valid TOML
3. test_config_files_valid - validates all TOML config files
4. test_repo_structure - validates required directory structure
5. test_scripts_valid_syntax - validates shell script syntax

CI commands discovered from .github/workflows/:
- ruff check (style.yaml) - not added due to missing ruff in image
- pytest tests -m not gpu (cpu_tests.yaml) - not added due to dependency requirements
- All tests verified to pass on base commit 5c5560039dad1359efc2dcd7e3a939bc3d95b6fe
